## Summary

- [ ] Briefly describe the change
- [ ] Link issue/ticket

## Type of Change

- [ ] Feature
- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] CI/CD
- [ ] Infrastructure
- [ ] Documentation

## Validation

- [ ] Backend tests pass (`backend`)
- [ ] Frontend build passes (`frontend`)
- [ ] AI tests pass (`AI`)
- [ ] Kubernetes manifests validated
- [ ] Ansible inventory/variables validated (`infra/ansible`)

## Checklist

- [ ] Follows branch naming convention
- [ ] Uses conventional commit format
- [ ] Adds or updates docs where needed
- [ ] No secrets committed
